caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses is positioned against a solid dark grey background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top featuring floral embroidery and a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom-left and bottom-right corners of each frame, a circular gold logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing to form words. While her upper body remains relatively still in the first three frames, she begins to gesture with her right hand in the final frame, lifting it slightly and moving it across her chest to emphasize her speech. The lighting is consistent and focused on her face and torso, maintaining a professional, educational presentation style.
